title: Randomly 3D
description: I want to make Minecrafts 2D textures into 3D models!
body:
This resource pack is designed to make Minecraft look more 3D by turning the flat 2D textures into 3D models. The goal is to give the game a greater sense of depth and remove most 2D textures.

Right now, the project is still in its early alpha stage, which means that only a small portion of what I want to do have been converted so far. Once I’ve added the “bare minimum” of features and blocks that I consider essential, the pack will move into a beta stage. The first full release will happen when I’ve completed, or nearly completed, everything I originally set out to include.

Please keep in mind that my work scedule on this project is very casual. I work on it in my free time as a personal hobby, and updates will not follow a fixed schedule. Sometimes progress may be quick, while at other times it might slow down or pause entirely, depending on my motivation and availability.
